series_metadata.series_description: Files containing permits with accompanying plans and specifications, closure plans, alterations, "Rule 13" authorizations, variances, exemptions, Ohio Department of Health Plan Approvals, and other actions for solid waste, infectious waste and construction and demolition debris facilities.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: For currently operating and closed facilities: Retain all associated files for 30 years after the facility closure date., Paper: Recycle
